summary: Frontend-only testing completed for chess learning app bug fixes. All 3 reported bugs/features have been verified as fixed and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation flow: Welcome screen -> 'Ingresar' -> 'Alumno' -> 'Entrena' (bottom nav) -> 'Practica' card. Key data-testid attributes: chessboard-container, chessboard-grid, level-indicator, square-{row}-{col}, piece-{row}-{col}, reset-board-btn, hint-btn, move-counter, exercise-info

bug_fix_1_uniform_squares.details: All 9 measured squares are exactly 44.7x44.7 pixels - uniform size confirmed regardless of piece presence

bug_fix_2_level_switch_auto_reset.details: Switching between levels (1->2->3->4->1) automatically resets the board with the correct piece. No need to click 'Reiniciar'

level_indicator.details: Visual badge above board shows 'Nivel X – Description' format correctly for all 4 levels

piece_movement.details: Select piece -> shows valid move dots (blue circles) -> click valid move -> piece moves, move counter increments, success message shown

reiniciar_button.details: Resets board to initial position and move counter to 0

exercise_switching.details: Clicking 'Ejercicio 2' within same level switches to different exercise

level_details_verified.nivel_3: Capturas y Jaque - Capture and check exercises
